title: Housesitter: The Night They Saved Siegfried's Brain

overview: Combining 1980’s horror and 1950’s sci-fi, it’s the story of an idealist medical student with a serious Elvis obsession, who is determined to perfect his rat-to-rat brain transfer to “help mankind and change the face of modern science
